name: Zucchini Bread-Hilda Tuccillo
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs in a large bowl.
2. Gradually beat in sugar until well combined.
3. Add oil gradually to the egg mixture, mixing continuously.
4. In a separate bowl, combine all dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and baking powder).
5. Mix the dry ingredients into the wet mixture slowly.
6. Stir in raisins, walnuts, and vanilla extract.
7. Grease two 9 x 5 x 2 3/4 inch loaf pans with butter or cooking spray.
8. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
9. Bake on the lowest rack of the oven at 350°F for 55 minutes, or until a clean toothpick inserted in the center comes out dry.
10. Remove from the oven and let stand in the pans on wire racks for 10 minutes.
11. Turn out the bread onto a serving plate to cool further.
NOTE: My Mother said she uses only 3/4 teaspoon of salt, and it is still tasty.
